compact.name: Compact
compact.description: Good for long words and sentences

store.title: Store
store.subtitle: Official vocabulary bundle catalog and purchase entitlements are kept separate. The real billing implementation can be connected later.
store.heroBody: Bundles are pulled from the Supabase public catalog, cached in SQLite, and kept separate from the entitlement layer.
store.catalogErrorMessage: Check the Supabase public catalog setup and network connection.
store.emptyCatalogMessage: Published bundles in the Supabase public catalog will appear here.
store.supabaseRequiredMessage: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to sync paid bundle catalogs.

bundleDetail.title: Bundle
bundleDetail.errorSubtitle: There was a problem syncing the catalog.
bundleDetail.missingSubtitle: This bundle is not registered or is still loading.
bundleDetail.missingBody: The store catalog and entitlement sync remain separated.
bundleDetail.subtitle: Bundle detail starts with billing UI and entitlement checks separated.
